name: WaterChemicalDataTransformation
label: Water Chemical Data transformation
description: Transforms validated Excel templates into analysis-ready CSV files. Computes weighted pH and conductivity for pH_COND files, calculates alkalinity via linear regression for ALKALINITY files, and consolidates AMMONIUM, ANIONS, CATIONS and DOC_TN files. Outputs one CSV per SiteCode per ICP subprogram.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: Validated data ZIP
inputs.description: ZIP archive produced by the DataFormatValidation wrapper, containing validated Excel workbooks (.xlsx) with a 'data' sheet each.

outputs.name: output-data
outputs.label: Transformed data ZIP
outputs.description: ZIP archive containing one tab-separated CSV per SiteCode per subprogram if have been analysed (ALKALINITY, pH_COND_WEIGHTED_RAW, AMMONIUM, ANIONS, CATIONS, DOC_TN).

author: LifeWatch ERIC
